'''Gasto''' was a [[Midshipman/Legends|midshipman]] serving the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Navy]] onboard the ''[[Adamantine]]'' when it was infected with the [[Death Seed]] plague in [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]].

{{Char-stub}}
